global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various shapes and text elements promoting cashback offers.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback and order now.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Circular and rectangular shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape are centered, both outlined in a lighter shade, creating a modern design element.

elements.label: Additional circular shape
elements.description: Another circular shape is slightly lower than the first, maintaining the same outline style, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape is positioned slightly above the center, outlined similarly to the other shapes, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A small button with rounded edges that reads 'Order now', positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A small text element that conveys additional information, positioned near the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: Another small text element located near the bottom right, complementing the main message.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline that reads 'Earn cashback daily', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'Swiftstack' is displayed at the top left, featuring a simple and modern font.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller call to action text that says 'Order now', located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and minimalistic, cashback offers, shapes and text elements
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Built for peace of mind, Swiftstack, Order now
